name: hubhop
description: Jump to any GitHub repo from your browser address bar. Type 'hh <repo>' and go.

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../../releases/hubhop-chrome-$npm_package_version.zip . && echo 'Packaged dist/chrome → releases/'
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build -s dist/firefox -a releases --overwrite-dest
scripts.package: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
scripts.lint: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint -s dist/firefox
